title: --secret from ENV not working
body:
### Issue Description

podman is not processing ENV variables

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run this command:
```
→ TEST_VAR="hello" podman build --secret id=test,env=TEST_VAR -t test-image - <<'DOCKERFILE'
FROM alpine
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
DOCKERFILE
```
I've also tried with `--secret id=test,src=TEST_VAR,type=env` and podman actually incorrectly tries to read a file... so, a bug within a bug.

### Describe the results you received

Note that the output does not show "hello"
```
STEP 1/2: FROM alpine
STEP 2/2: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
hi
bye
COMMIT test-image
--> 48bf605da8ab
Successfully tagged localhost/test-image:latest
48bf605da8aba76dfe3b6d9767a01463c87e532bf0be0e40f3d0bfa7fd2bfa0c
```

### Describe the results you expected

I expect the secret at `/run/secrets/[id]` to contain the ENV content ("hello", in this case)

### podman info output


comments.body:
Hey @chris-ari , 

Not sure what's going on here, I can't reproduce the issue:

```
❯ TEST_VAR="hello" podman build --secret id=test,env=TEST_VAR -t test-image - <<'DOCKERFILE'
FROM alpine
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
DOCKERFILE
STEP 1/2: FROM alpine
STEP 2/2: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
hi
hellobye
COMMIT test-image
--> f1e5f98e7361
Successfully tagged localhost/test-image:latest
f1e5f98e7361f987510d78ffaa944586a9bfef053727859a096167eeb4d3551d
```

Running on Linux:
```
❯ podman --version
podman version 5.7.1
```

From your linked issues it seems like there may be an issue with this when using podman-remote but I don't think that's the case for you?

~I can repro on macOS 26 with podman 5.7.1:~ <-- my issue is probably #19844, sorry for the noise

```bash
$ TEST_VAR="hello" podman build --secret id=test,env=TEST_VAR -t test-image - <<'DOCKERFILE'
FROM alpine
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
DOCKERFILE
STEP 1/2: FROM alpine
STEP 2/2: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=test echo hi; cat /run/secrets/test; echo bye
hi
bye
COMMIT test-image
--> 6776e42bbdbe
Successfully tagged localhost/test-image:latest
6776e42bbdbe0cff5007665ca4c16f2ae5b275329d0cc7ebc1651d8043186feb
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
That was fixed in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27602 which went into 5.8
